nodes.label: AI as emotional support and confidence booster
nodes.label_negative: Solo stewing in frustration and anxiety
nodes.grounding_span: I used to just stew in the frustration and it was making me hate my job and feel very alone

nodes.label: AI as collaborative thinking partner
nodes.grounding_span: More often is a collab, where I'm trying to either work out a plan, research something specific

nodes.label: AI for administrative efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: boring tasks that I know could be sped up with the help of AI

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: sometimes they won't quite do what I ask, or things get jumbled

nodes.label: Industry concern about AI replacing creative jobs
nodes.grounding_span: there is a big movement against the use of AI, particularly because it can be used so creatively

nodes.label: Personal knowledge and relationship in client representation
nodes.grounding_span: it requires physically knowing the person you are representing and their quirks

nodes.label: Professional competence and successful advocacy
nodes.grounding_span: I found confidence in the information and key notes that we came up with together

nodes.label: Productivity and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: sped up with the help of AI

nodes.label: Protection of creative industry and client interests
nodes.grounding_span: try to get our clients to steer clear of contracts where there are clauses that the footage or voice can be used for AI

nodes.label: Job security and irreplaceability
nodes.grounding_span: if AI could do that aspect I think that my job would be made entirely redundant

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as confidence builder
nodes.grounding_span: the time I felt most satisfied was the situation discussed with the commercial buyout issue

nodes.label: Frustration with AI misunderstanding or jumbling
nodes.grounding_span: sometimes they won't quite do what I ask, or things get jumbled

nodes.label: Cautious concern about AI in creative industry
nodes.grounding_span: I understand the worry and am cautious about what information I add to the system

nodes.label: Positive anticipation of AI as adaptive collaborator
nodes.grounding_span: I like to think of AI as a collaborator so in the future as my business needs change it will adapt

nodes.label: Emotionally-driven task delegation — uses AI to manage anxiety and frustration
nodes.grounding_span: I can get a bit nervous when faced with confrontation and sometimes my job relies on me arguing a point so I would use AI

nodes.label: Collaborative brainstorming and iterative dialogue
nodes.grounding_span: bounce my ideas off for future business plans or just to chat things through to affirm my point
